case_title: POLTASH, GARY (PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS) VS LARSON, BRADLEY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLTASH, GARY  (PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LARSON, BRADLEY $598.45 PRINCIPAL, $145.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $743.95, ORIGINAL AGREEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAS ENTERED ON 8/19/2001. DEFENDANT WROTE A LETTER TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/20/05 ADDRESSING THE OUTSTANDING ISSUES IN DISPUTE AND A SETTLEMENT OFFER FOR A REDUCED AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, BRADLEY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,196.89 FILED BY POLTASH, GARY  (PROPERTY TAX ADVISORS) AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, BRADLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LARSON, BRADLEY
